Cell[BoxData[
 RowBox[{
  RowBox[{"totalPlot", "[", "betamu_", "]"}], ":=", 
  RowBox[{"Module", "[", 
   RowBox[{
    RowBox[{"{", 
     RowBox[{"data", ",", "fname", ",", "beta", ",", "mu", ",", "pfx"}], 
     "}"}], ",", "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
    RowBox[{
     RowBox[{"beta", "=", 
      RowBox[{"betamu", "[", 
       RowBox[{"[", "1", "]"}], "]"}]}], ";", "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
     RowBox[{"mu", "=", 
      RowBox[{"betamu", "[", 
       RowBox[{"[", "2", "]"}], "]"}]}], ";", "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
     RowBox[{"fname", "=", 
      RowBox[{
      "root", "<>", "\"\</output_b\>\"", "<>", "beta", "<>", "\"\<_m\>\"", "<>",
        "mu", "<>", "\"\</total_animals.csv\>\""}]}], ";", 
     "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
     RowBox[{"data", "=", 
      RowBox[{"Import", "[", 
       RowBox[{"fname", ",", "\"\<CSV\>\""}], "]"}]}], ";", 
     "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
     RowBox[{"data", "=", 
      RowBox[{"(", 
       RowBox[{
        RowBox[{"Total", "[", "data", "]"}], "/", 
        RowBox[{
         RowBox[{"Dimensions", "[", "data", "]"}], "[", 
         RowBox[{"[", "1", "]"}], "]"}]}], ")"}]}], ";", 
     "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
     RowBox[{"pfx", "=", 
      RowBox[{"prefix", "[", 
       RowBox[{"[", "curprefix", "]"}], "]"}]}], ";", "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
     RowBox[{"curprefix", "=", 
      RowBox[{"curprefix", "+", "1"}]}], ";", "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
     RowBox[{"ListPlot", "[", "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
      RowBox[{
       RowBox[{"Table", "[", 
        RowBox[{
         RowBox[{"{", 
          RowBox[{"i", ",", 
           RowBox[{"data", "[", 
            RowBox[{"[", "i", "]"}], "]"}]}], "}"}], ",", 
         RowBox[{"{", 
          RowBox[{"i", ",", 
           RowBox[{"52", "*", "5"}], ",", 
           RowBox[{"Length", "[", "data", "]"}]}], "}"}]}], "]"}], ",", 
       "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
       RowBox[{"PlotRange", "\[Rule]", 
        RowBox[{"{", 
         RowBox[{"0", ",", "500"}], "}"}]}], ",", "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
       RowBox[{"Joined", "\[Rule]", "True"}], ",", "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
       RowBox[{"PlotLabel", "\[Rule]", 
        RowBox[{
        "\"\<(\>\"", "<>", "pfx", "<>", "\"\<)  \[Beta]=\>\"", "<>", "beta", 
         "<>", "\"\< \[Mu]=\>\"", "<>", "mu"}]}], ",", "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
       
       RowBox[{"AxesLabel", "\[Rule]", 
        RowBox[{"{", 
         RowBox[{"\"\<Time (weeks)\>\"", ",", "\"\<No. of animals\>\""}], 
         "}"}]}], ",", "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
       RowBox[{"ImagePadding", "\[Rule]", 
        RowBox[{"{", 
         RowBox[{
          RowBox[{"{", 
           RowBox[{"30", ",", "Automatic"}], "}"}], ",", 
          RowBox[{"{", 
           RowBox[{"Automatic", ",", "Automatic"}], "}"}]}], "}"}]}]}], 
      "\[IndentingNewLine]", "]"}]}]}], "\[IndentingNewLine]", 
   "]"}]}]], "Input",
 CellChangeTimes->{{3.803348907571703*^9, 3.803348994647766*^9}, {
